Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Continued To Jan-13-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Peterson, Esq. for Trustee: Antony A. Tyshuk.
Mr. Peterson stated that matter has settled and money will be paid today.
The Court continued the matter to Jan. 13, 2010 at 10:00 am.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jung.
